adapter.description:
Optional preferred storage or delivery adapter. Slack adapters deliver into the mapped Slack thread; omitted document and spreadsheet artifacts use connector storage with S3 fallback.

* `slack_message` - slack_message
* `slack_canvas` - slack_canvas
* `slack_file` - slack_file
* `document_connector` - document_connector
* `s3` - s3
* `github_pr` - github_pr

artifact_type.description:
Artifact format or delivery surface to create, such as document, spreadsheet, slack_canvas, or file.

* `slack_message` - slack_message
* `slack_canvas` - slack_canvas
* `document` - document
* `spreadsheet` - spreadsheet
* `dashboard` - dashboard
* `file` - file
* `github_pr` - github_pr

content.description: Markdown or text content for the initial artifact version.

content_base64.description: Base64-encoded binary content for Slack file uploads or binary S3-backed artifacts. Prefer source_artifact_id or source_storage_path for large files that were already uploaded as run artifacts.

content_type.description: MIME type for content_base64 or source-backed artifacts, such as application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet.

metadata.description: Optional metadata to persist with the living artifact.

name.description: Human-readable artifact name, used as the title.

slack_channel_id.description: For slack_message drafts, optional target Slack channel ID such as C123. Defaults to the run's mapped Slack channel.

slack_delivery_mode.description:
For slack_message artifacts, use 'draft' to post a Slack approval card before sending or 'send' to preserve immediate delivery into the mapped Slack thread.

* `send` - send
* `draft` - draft

slack_thread_ts.description: For slack_message drafts, optional target Slack thread timestamp. Omit to post in the target channel root.

source_artifact_id.description: Existing run artifact id to use as the initial content source.

source_storage_path.description: Existing run artifact storage_path to use as the initial content source.
